name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Can we talk on Wednesday?
body:
Do you have plans on Wednesday? Friend, did you see the email my campaign sent you last week? I would love to talk with you this Wednesday.

**[Follow this link to learn more about our supporter-only call and sign up today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29801640:28585339046:m:1:877327319:42ACF2B14BD58556CB539589190D17F3:r)**

Thanks,

Lindsey

| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29801640:28585339046:m:1:877327319:42ACF2B14BD58556CB539589190D17F3:r)
---
---
|
**Do you have time to jump on a call with Senator Graham this Wednesday, August 19th?**

On this special supporter-only call, you'll be able to hear directly from Senator Graham about the latest from the campaign trail and the critical issues facing our nation.

**This call is limited to Senator Graham's most loyal supporters, so please[visit this link now to find out how to participate](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29801640:28585339046:m:1:877327319:42ACF2B14BD58556CB539589190D17F3:r). **

Please join us for this call with Senator Graham.

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham 2016

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29801640:28585339046:m:1:877327319:42ACF2B14BD58556CB539589190D17F3:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

name: Ben Carson
subject: VOTE: Name my new campaign bus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29822749:28587022304:m:1:876315805:FE7E90A0F06977F2699D1F2B5AA64F23:r)
---

Peter,

Just the other day, I received an email from a supporter named Grace. She said that she saw a picture online of my new campaign bus, and asked me if we had named it yet.

We thought it was a great idea, and my staff has narrowed it down to 3 names.

[**As always, I would love to get your input. Please vote for your favorite name now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29822750:28587022304:m:1:876315805:FE7E90A0F06977F2699D1F2B5AA64F23:r)

Once we decide, the bus will have its own social media feed so everyone can see where we are as we travel across this large and beautiful country.
Thanks for your ongoing support and participation. It's great to have you on my team.

\- Ben
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29822750:28587022304:m:1:876315805:FE7E90A0F06977F2699D1F2B5AA64F23:r)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Short survey for Friend
body:
Friend -

It's been two months since I launched my bid for President. I've traveled the country, meeting with thousands of Americans from every walk of life, and showing them my heart.

It may be awhile until we get a chance to meet on the campaign trail, but I want to hear from you today. [**Will you take a couple of minutes out of your day and share which issues matter most to you, and what you need from your next president by filling out your 2016 Voter Response Survey?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/iymkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqryvncd_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

You may not know this, but as Governor, I spent 30 hours a week reading and responding to emails from Floridians. Your thoughts, your opinions and your story matter to me. They always have, that's why I want you to fill out this survey: [**Jeb2016.com/2016-Voter-Response-Survey**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/fdbztbylrnjwqpqdwbfzrwcpyywclptlzbgbjlpdhgyg_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

In the coming days we'll compile the results, and I look forward to seeing your feedback.

Together, we will take command of our future again in this country.

But this only happens together. This is a road I cannot travel alone, I need your help, your guidance, and with that, we will all rise.

Thank you, Friend, and I look forward to reading your response: [**Jeb2016.com/2016-Voter-Response-Survey**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wdvqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhdvnjz_jmqvvfns.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Jeb
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3111&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Colleen
subject: They’re back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter, you remember the protesters and the death threats. You fought beside Governor Walker and we won. But now the left wing special interests are back with even uglier attacks. Yesterday a picture was posted of a little girl carrying the severed head of Governor Walker.
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMyOTQ5NjkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNzE1MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, you remember the protesters and the death threats. You fought beside Governor Walker and we won. But now the left wing special interests are back with even uglier attacks. _Yesterday a picture was posted of a little girl carrying the severed head of Governor Walker._ The comments in response to this picture were truly disgusting: _"Thought provoking...is all I can say..."
"Vindication, survival! It inspires me"
"Still can't get enough of this"_ Then at an event in Iowa a protester tried to rattle the governor, and his response was definitely not expected by the protester. But as you know, the governor is not shaken easily. **"I'm not intimidated by you, sir, or anyone else out there. I will fight for the American people over and over and over and over again. You want someone who's tested? I'm right here."** We won in Wisconsin because of you, Peter. **[Chip in $10, $25, $50, $75, $100, $500, or even $1,000 just like you did before and let's share the progress in Wisconsin with America.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMyOTQ5NjkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNzE1MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** You know better than most that Governor Walker is the candidate for president who will fight and win for the American people. You've seen his conservative reforms work. Show these liberals you will not stand for their vicious attacks and stand with Governor Walker today. **[Your contribution of $10, $25, $50, $75, $100, $500, or even $1,000 will give us the resources to fight back and win just like it did before.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMyOTQ5NjkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNzE1MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** Thank you, Colleen [Contribute](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMyOTQ5NjkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNzE1MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMyOTQ5NjkS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxNzE1MzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Tell Congress: No background check, no sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
NEW PEW POLL: 85% of Americans Support Background Checks
**[Sign Here To Demand Congress Act Now To Reduce Gun Violence ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f72/70cdc2ba/479999c7/395028c/804514306/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")** Friend, A new poll from The Pew Research Center shows that **85% of Americans support expanding background checks** to cover sales from private owners and at gun shows. That's an overwhelming majority, and yet Congress continues to kowtow to the NRA and the gun lobby, refusing to take action.

As gun violence continues to plague our communities, we can't stand by and do nothing.

**What we need is a little more common sense and political courage in Washington. Congress needs to act.**

[_**Add your name: Demand Congress put public safety before the NRA and act now on background checks.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f72/70cdc2ba/479999c7/395028c/804514306/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")

As Maryland's next U.S. Senator, I'll continue to fight for effective solutions to keep guns out of the wrong hands. This year I've introduced the Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act, which would offer incentives for states to implement laws, like we have here in Maryland, that require a license to purchase a handgun -- the same way we need a license to drive a car or fish in a river.

The cost of inaction on this issue is simply too high. **Join me and help send a message that Americans are tired of waiting for action to end gun violence.**

[_**Call on Congress to act on background checks on all gun sales: add your name now. >>**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f72/70cdc2ba/479999c7/395028c/804514306/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")

Thanks for stepping up.

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f72/70cdc2ba/479999c7/395028d/804514306/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Stand with Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
| **Pat Toomey: "Planned Parenthood has an appalling disregard for human life."**

Planned Parenthood saves lives. 2.7 million women and men rely on the organization for accessible and affordable birth control, reproductive health exams, cancer screenings, and testing and treatment for sexually transmitted diseases.

[**Add your name to stand with Planned Parenthood today >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/726015323186135040/6313222043852603392?recipientId=LedFxp5Xruh0iL6JxQE7O1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

Friend,

It really is stunning. Supposedly in the name of protecting life, anti-choice extremists are taking health care and life saving treatment away from millions of women. This time they are using a misleading campaign against Planned Parenthood as a guise to defund an organization that provides countless women with critical health care service.

[**We can 't let these efforts succeed. Add your name to stand with Planned Parenthood and oppose Republican efforts to defund this critical institution. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/726015323186135040/6313222043852603392?recipientId=LedFxp5Xruh0iL6JxQE7O1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Millions of women, men and young people across America depend on Planned Parenthood for quality, affordable healthcare. **One out of five women in America have relied on Planned Parenthood for care and Pennsylvania 's affiliates serve more than 100,000 patients a year. **

**And it gets worse: Pat Toomey not only voted to defund Planned Parenthood -- to take away health care for hundreds of thousands of women that live in our Commonwealth -- but he also co-sponsored the bill.** Pennsylvanians deserve better than that.

I can tell you this: Pat Toomey is sacrificing women's health and privacy in order to further his own ideology and political ambitions. We can't let Senator Toomey's broadside against Planned Parenthood stand.

[**Join with me today and tell Pat Toomey and Republicans in Congress that we stand with Planned Parenthood.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/726015323186135040/6313222043852603392?recipientId=LedFxp5Xruh0iL6JxQE7O1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Thanks,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/726015323186135040/6385279637890531328?refcode=20150818e&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/726015323186135040/6241164449814675456).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
clean_body: | Pat Toomey: "Planned Parenthood has an appalling disregard for human life." Planned Parenthood saves lives. 2.7 million women and men rely on the organization for accessible and affordable birth control, reproductive health exams, cancer screenings, and testing and treatment for sexually transmitted diseases. Friend, It really is stunning. Supposedly in the name of protecting life, anti-choice extremists are taking health care and life saving treatment away from millions of women. This time they are using a misleading campaign against Planned Parenthood as a guise to defund an organization that provides countless women with critical health care service. Millions of women, men and young people across America depend on Planned Parenthood for quality, affordable healthcare. One out of five women in America have relied on Planned Parenthood for care and Pennsylvania 's affiliates serve more than 100,000 patients a year. And it gets worse: Pat Toomey not only voted to defund Planned Parenthood -- to take away health care for hundreds of thousands of women that live in our Commonwealth -- but he also co-sponsored the bill. Pennsylvanians deserve better than that. I can tell you this: Pat Toomey is sacrificing women's health and privacy in order to further his own ideology and political ambitions. We can't let Senator Toomey's broadside against Planned Parenthood stand. Thanks, Katie | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Marco Rubio
subject: We should replace Obamacare with this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
It's simple: To help more of our people
achieve the American Dream, we need to make affordable, quality
healthcare accessible in the 21st Century. It's clear that
President Obama's one-size-fits-all, big government approach has
failed to achieve this goal.
Here's how:
Many Americans have seen the law transition from a political mess
to a personal disaster
Some have lost access to their doctors or their insurance plans
they were happy with
Many have been forced to pay higher premiums and higher
deductibles
Others have lost their jobs or had their hours cut
Many Americans have seen the law transition
from a political mess to a personal disaster
Some have lost access to their doctors or their insurance plans
they were happy with
Many have been forced to pay higher premiums and higher
deductibles
Others have lost their jobs or had their hours cut

Many Americans have seen the law
transition from a political mess to a personal disaster
Some have lost access to their doctors or
their insurance plans they were happy with
Many have been forced to pay higher
premiums and higher deductibles
Others have lost their jobs or had their
hours cut

>>Click here to donate now and join Marco in
fighting for affordable, quality healthcare.<<

I have been fighting against Obamacare since
the day I arrived in the U.S. Senate. I led the charge to stop
its taxpayer-funded bailouts of the insurance industry and,
fortunately, was successful in blocking them from taking place
this year.
But more must be done, and when I am
president, repealing and replacing ObamaCare will be an urgent
priority of my administration.
My health care reform plan includes three
primary components:
Create an advanceable, refundable tax credit that all Americans
can use to purchase health insurance
Reform insurance regulations to lower costs, encourage
innovation, and protect the vulnerable
Save and strengthen Medicare and Medicaid by placing them on
fiscally-sustainable paths.

Create an advanceable, refundable tax
credit that all Americans can use to purchase health insurance
Reform insurance regulations to lower
costs, encourage innovation, and protect the vulnerable
Save and strengthen Medicare and Medicaid
by placing them on fiscally-sustainable paths.

While other measures may be necessary to undo
the damage done by ObamaCare, I believe these three concepts are
the core of a plan to lower costs and put patients and families
back in control of their healthcare decisions.
But I need your help to make this a reality.
If having a health care system that strengthens the American
dream in the 21st Century is important to you, please donate now
and help us win.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43480252:18726221893:m:3:1349778030:5237C3F1941ED28CB0EECB54BCB9CF3D:r
Sincerely,
Marco Rubio

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
